coupons.title: New Customer Discount
coupons.detail: First-time customers save 10% on any garage door service. Welcome to the family.

coupons.title: Senior Discount
coupons.detail: A thank-you to our senior neighbors — 10% off your service call.

coupons.title: Military & First Responder
coupons.detail: For active military, veterans, and first responders — thank you for your service.

coupons.title: End-of-Month Special
coupons.detail: Booking near the end of the month? Ask about our end-of-month savings when you call.

terms: Mention the offer when you book. Show on your phone at the time of service. One offer per visit — cannot be combined with other discounts.
